title: message_set update: full message fetch + ownership check is non-atomic with subsequent field writes
description: jmap.rs message_set update path: ownership is checked by fetching the message with store.get_messages (outside a transaction), then individual field writes happen in separate calls (edit_message_body, soft_delete_message, set_message_reaction). A concurrent delete between the ownership check and the write can cause a write to a message that no longer exists or to a message whose sender has changed. The validate path needs to be inside the same transaction as the write, or a read-and-write operation at the store layer must validate atomically. Trigger: concurrent Message/set destroy and Message/set update from two clients on the same message.
